title: VETERANS AND FAMILY CENTER - 211info
text: CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS RANCH VETERANS AND FAMILY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community greenhouse and garden. Also offers farming, ranching, and beekeeping lessons. 65920 SW 61st Street Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Must be a veteran Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 706-9062 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 706-9062 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes, Jefferson, and Crook Counties Services: Community Gardening * Veterans Gardening/Landscaping Instruction * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - VETERAN SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
